name: Grade 10 Geography — Semester 2
description: An 18-week Grade 10 pathway for environmental challenges, spatial models, policy, and evidence-based proposals. Learning advances through inquiry, practice, authentic application, revision, and communication.
learningGoals: Develop grade 10 knowledge and transferable skills in environmental challenges, spatial models, policy, and evidence-based proposals.
Use appropriate evidence, vocabulary, tools, and methods to explain reasoning.
Plan, revise, collaborate responsibly, and communicate a well-supported conclusion.

lessons.objective: I can develop a focused question and gather relevant evidence about environmental challenges, spatial models, policy, and evidence-based proposals and explain my reasoning with appropriate evidence.
